# Security Policy

## Reporting Vulnerabilities

If you find a security vulnerability, **do not open a public issue**. Instead, contact the maintainer directly at stuartgabriel@ymail.com with:

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Suggested fix (if any)

We will acknowledge your report and work on a fix. Patches will be documented in release notes.

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 0.5.x | Yes |
| < 0.5 | No |
